name: IOT · SCADA Telemetry — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Plant A', 'Pump', 12, 2880, 120),
  ('Plant A', 'Compressor', 7, 2940, 60),
  ('Plant A', 'Sensor', 3, 2990, 10),
  ('Plant B', 'Pump', 21, 2760, 240),
  ('Plant B', 'Compressor', 15, 2820, 180),
  ('Plant B', 'Sensor', 5, 2970, 30),
  ('Plant C', 'Pump', 9, 2910, 90),
  ('Plant C', 'Compressor', 4, 2960, 40),
  ('Plant C', 'Sensor', 2, 2995, 5),
  ('Facility D', 'Pump', 18, 2790, 210),
  ('Facility D', 'Compressor', 11, 2860, 140),
  ('Facility D', 'Sensor', 6, 2955, 45),
  ('Facility E', 'Pump', 25, 2700, 300),
  ('Facility E', 'Compressor', 19, 2760, 240),
  ('Facility E', 'Sensor', 8, 2940, 60)
) AS t(facility, equipment_type, alerts, uptime_minutes, downtime_minutes)
